_readme: Cache-key compatibility fixture (design doc §8 + §11.1). Each entry records a representative git-diff output captured from the 0.10.1 bash core and the expected SHA-256 cache key. Phase 1-4 implementations MUST produce the byte-exact expected_key for each scenario, or the port has broken every consumer cache and the PR is rejected. DO NOT edit this file to fix a failing test — the test is asserting an external contract.

bare-push-small.diff:
diff --git a/README.md b/README.md
index abc..def 100644
--- a/README.md
+++ b/README.md
@@ -1,3 +1,4 @@
 # rea
+new line
 line 2
 line 3

multi-refspec.diff:
diff --git a/src/a.ts b/src/a.ts
index aaa..bbb 100644
--- a/src/a.ts
+++ b/src/a.ts
@@ -1,2 +1,3 @@
 export const a = 1;
+export const b = 2;
 diff --git a/src/b.ts b/src/b.ts
index ccc..ddd 100644
--- a/src/b.ts
+++ b/src/b.ts
@@ -1,1 +1,2 @@
 export const c = 3;
+export const d = 4;

force-push-rewrite.diff:
diff --git a/file.txt b/file.txt
index 111..222 100644
--- a/file.txt
+++ b/file.txt
@@ -1,5 +1,5 @@
-old line 1
-old line 2
+new line 1
+new line 2
 unchanged
 unchanged
 unchanged

cross-repo-scan.diff:
diff --git a/hooks/test.sh b/hooks/test.sh
index aaa..bbb 100755
--- a/hooks/test.sh
+++ b/hooks/test.sh
@@ -1,1 +1,2 @@
 #!/bin/bash
+echo hi

diff --git a/src/café.ts b/src/café.ts
index abc..def 100644

+++ b/src/café.ts
